hero.subtitle: 24/7 safe, comfortable, and fast transportation in Adana
hero.trust1Desc: Licensed drivers and regularly maintained cars.
hero.trust2Desc: Average dispatch time is around 8-12 minutes.

features.title: Why Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi?
features.lead: Fast response, safe driving, and experienced local drivers within an approximate 2 km service zone around the station.

f1.title: 24/7 Service
f1.desc: At your service any time of day.

f2.title: Safe and Insured
f2.desc: Ride with licensed and insured drivers.

f3.title: Approx. 2 km Service Zone
f3.desc: Fast pickup in neighborhoods close to the station.

f4.title: Experienced Drivers
f4.desc: Local drivers who know the city well.

testimonials.title: Customer Reviews
testimonials.r1: Arrived fast and the car was very clean. Thanks.
testimonials.r2: The only station I trust in Adana. Available 24/7.
testimonials.r3: Driver was very kind, and the ride felt safe.

map.title: Our Service Area
map.desc: Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi serves an approximate 2 km radius around the station.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What area does Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi serve?
faq.a1: We serve approximately within a 2 km area around our station. Requests from farther locations are handled based on availability.
faq.q2: How quickly can a taxi be dispatched?
faq.a2: Depending on traffic, we usually dispatch quickly within our core service area.
faq.a3: You can reach us 24/7 by phone at +90 530 222 77 95 or via WhatsApp.
faq.q4: Why choose Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi?
faq.a4: Passengers choose us for fast response, clear communication, safe driving, and a customer-focused service approach.

footer.description: Kenan Evren Sultan Taxi provides reliable 24/7 service within an approximate 2 km service zone.
